zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall於1110年出生在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾時，他的父親Hugh Fitzeon De Tattershall40歲，母親Isabel De Gaunt20歲。他於1155年與Isabel de Welles在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1185年在他的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall于1110年出生在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾时，他的父亲Hugh Fitzeon De Tattershall40岁，母亲Isabel De Gaunt20岁。他于1155年与Isabel de Welles在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1185年在他的家乡享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fitzhugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall was born in 1110, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Hugh Fitzeon De Tattershall, was 40 and his mother, Isabel De Gaunt, was 20. He married Isabel de Welles in 1155, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1185, in his hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall est né en 1110, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Fitzeon De Tattershall, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Isabel De Gaunt, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Welles en 1155, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1185, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall 1110 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Fitzeon De Tattershall 40 und seine Mutter Isabel De Gaunt 20. Er hat 1155 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England Isabel de Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1185 im Alter von 75 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall è nato il nel 1110 nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh Fitzeon De Tattershall, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Isabel De Gaunt, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Welles nel 1155, nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1185, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershallが1110年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルで生まれた時，父Hugh Fitzeon De Tattershallは40歳，母Isabel De Gauntは20歳であった。1155年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルでIsabel de Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1185年に故郷で75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall(이)가 1110년 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Fitzeon De Tattershall(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel De Gaunt(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1155년 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 Isabel de Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1185년 그의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall nasceu em 1110, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Fitzeon De Tattershall, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Isabel De Gaunt, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Welles em 1155, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1185, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall родился в 1110 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Fitzeon De Tattershall было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel De Gaunt, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Welles в 1155 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1185 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Robert De Fitzhugh Of Tattershall nació en 1110, en Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Fitzeon De Tattershall, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Isabel De Gaunt, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Isabel de Welles en 1155, en Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1185, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
